ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jewelry_types" (
  "jewelry_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jewelry type */,
  "jewelry_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the jewelry type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the jewelry type */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the jewelry */,
  "design" TEXT /* Design or style of the jewelry */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the jewelry in grams */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jewelry_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "size_conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size conversion */,
  "jewelry_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jewelry type */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "size" REAL /* Size in the original region */,
  "equivalent_size" REAL /* Equivalent size in the target region */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the size */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Factor used to convert the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_jewelry_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("jewelry_type_id") REFERENCES jewelry_types ("jewelry_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "jewelry_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jewelry type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "design" TEXT /* Design or style of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product in grams */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the product in the default unit of measurement */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "stock_status" TEXT /* Current stock status (e.g., in stock, out of stock) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_jewelry_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("jewelry_type_id") REFERENCES jewelry_types ("jewelry_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventories" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity in stock */,
  "restock_level" INTEGER /* Restock level for the product */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventories_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or instructions for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the product in the order */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price of the product per unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Number of loyalty points the customer has earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid in the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., ground, air) */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date the shipment was sent */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Current status of the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was made */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Current status of the return */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded to the customer */,
  "refund_method" TEXT /* Method of refund (e.g., original payment method, store credit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was posted */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes indicating the review was helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
